---
title: "muninn_crucible.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/muninn_crucible.py"
loc: 72
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.05
style_score: 3.64
intel_score: 8.07
overall_score: 5.43
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating MuninnCrucible, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import MuninnCrucible and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.sentinel.code_sanitizer](file://src.sentinel.code_sanitizer)

### Exports
- `MuninnCrucible`
- `__init__`
- `generate_gauntlet`
- `generate_steel`
- `verify_fix`
- `apply_fix`
- `rollback`
